channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: US military carries out fresh strikes on Iran
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- US military launches fresh strikes on Iran – Middle East crisis live
- U.S. launches new airstrikes on Iran; Tehran fires back at 3 Gulf Arab states
- U.S. Launches New Airstrikes On Iran And Tehran Fires Back At Gulf Arab States
- Deadly US strikes trigger Iranian attacks on Gulf states
- New wave of US strikes, Iran's response: situation in Middle East
- US launches new airstrikes on Iran, with Tehran firing back at 3 Gulf Arab states
- US carries out fresh strikes on Iran, prompting attacks on Kuwait and Bahrain
- US launches fresh airstrikes on Iran as Tehran retaliates with attacks on Gulf states
- US military carries out fresh strikes on Iran, prompting Iran attacks on Kuwait and Bahrain
- Iran War Live Updates: Middle East war reignites? Iran threatens 'hard slap' after US strikes, targets 3 Gulf states
- US launches new airstrikes on Iran and Tehran fires back at Gulf Arab states
- US launches fresh strikes on Iran, Gulf hit back]]>

- Fire at a shoe factory kills 28 in one of China's deadliest blazes in recent years

- Fire at a shoe factory kills 28 in one of China’s deadliest blazes in recent years
- Factory fire kills at least 28 in China's 'shoe capital'
- At least 28 people killed as fire engulfs shoe factory in China
- Factory Fire in China Kills 28
- At least 28 people killed as fire engulfs shoe factory in China
- At least 28 dead in China factory fire: state media
- Factory fire kills at least 28 in China's 'shoe capital'
- At least 28 dead in fire at shoe factory in eastern China, state media reports
- China factory fire kills at least 28 people: state media
- China factory fire kills at least 28 people: State media
- Factory Fire in China Causes ‘Significant’ Casualties, Xi Says]]>

- Western Europe records its hottest June after searing heatwave
- Western Europe records its hottest June as heatwaves surge
- June 2026 in Western Europe temperatures break record as hottest in history — Copernicus

- Urgent: Western Europe records its hottest June: EU climate monitor

- Western Europe records its hottest June as heatwaves surge: EU monitor]]>
